_comment: Files that must stay in sync when bumping the plugin version. Run a single sed/jq command per release to update all entries to the same SemVer.

policy.patch: bug fixes, doc-only edits, no skill behavior change
policy.minor: new skill added, new optional block (Example, Rationalization Table), new script
policy.major: renamed skill, removed skill, changed Output Shape contract, breaking validate-skills.sh rule
